'''鈭歵h-n-z-b''' ('''kathanzeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuck|yuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuck|yuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathanzeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithanzeboko|thithanzeboko]] || [[word:jithanzeboko|jithanzeboko]] || [[word:shithanzeboko|shithanzeboko]] || [[word:kithanzeboko|kithanzeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathanzeboko|thathanzeboko]] || [[word:jathanzeboko|jathanzeboko]] || [[word:shathanzeboko|shathanzeboko]] || [[word:kathanzeboko|kathanzeboko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
